title: Dink 2.0
subtitle: Fullstack budgeting app that revolutionizes how you save
description: Dink is an all-in-one budgeting app that helps you keep track of your short term and long term financial goals. It synchronizes your bank account data live using the Plaid API to connect bank accounts and manage account transactions. You can create monthly budgets to track income and expenses. While also keeping track of your savings and allocating them to specific goals

title: Bugfixpy
subtitle: A Python command line tool that saved hundred of hours on fixing bugs in git repositories
description: Command line program that automates Github commands and Jira commands to automate a bug fixing process. This program clones repositories, opens VSCode and tracks changes in multiple branches, commits changes, and automatically cherry-picks commits if necessary. The program then transitions the related Jira ticket using the Jira API and comments commit message. This program improved the speed of bug fixes from 1 hour to 15 minutes on average.

title: The Daily Gerth
subtitle: Daily social media for a cat named 'Gerth'
description: Social media app that posts one cat picture per day for all users to see and rate. Once you rate the daily image you can checkout what other users have rated. Uses Firestore snapshots so that ratings and other data updates in realtime. Users can view each other's profiles and see their favorite pictures and top ratings.

title: Visualize
subtitle: Full stack web SaaS application for visualizing data
description: Vizualize is a simple SaaS platform that allows users to upload data and create dashboards to visualize their data. It includes a paid tier with that includes advanced features to visualize your data.

title: Cyber Guard
subtitle: #1 SaaS AI cloud security startup for enterprise businesses
description: Cyber Guard is an AI cloud security SaaS with the goal of changing the way of how security is viewed. With a clear, straightforward UI, the Cyber Guard website makes a professional statement and emphasizes the company's values.

title: Dink 1.0
subtitle: Personal financial budget tracker
description: The original inspiration for Dink2.0, started as a personal budget tracker for myself. With the goal of tracking all spending with an emphasis on savings. Dink1.0 was a great learning ground for a large-scale application that helped teach organization and filestructure for a large app.

title: Crumbl Cookie
subtitle: Mock recreation of Crumbl Cookie website

title: Web Tools
subtitle: A set of useful web tools I use for web design

title: StudFinder
subtitle: A dating app for trade professionals
description: A simple, fun dating app that lets you rate other potential matches. Uses an API to randomly generate user profiles for you to rate with a random user image. Give each profile a rating from 1-5. Use the stud finder to try and find a stud!

title: Notes App
subtitle: Copy of Google Keep notes app with improvements
